auth.resetOtpSent: Password reset code sent if the account exists.
auth.loggedOutAll: Logged out from all sessions successfully.

invite.acceptRequiresVerification: Verification code sent. Verify your email to complete invitation acceptance.

validation.maxLength: Value exceeds the maximum allowed length.
validation.lengthRange: Value length is out of range.
validation.invalidDateRange: Start date must not be later than end date.
validation.bodyRequiresAtLeastOneField: At least one updatable field is required.
validation.entityTypeRequiredWithEntityId: entityType is required when entityId is provided.

auth.passwordMustDiffer: New password must be different from current password.
auth.passwordRequiredForInvite: Password is required to continue invite signup.
auth.forbiddenTenant: You do not have access to this workspace.
auth.forbiddenRole: Your role is not allowed to perform this action in this workspace.

workspace.notMember: You are not a member of this workspace.

otp.tooManyAttempts: Too many invalid attempts. Try again later.
otp.resendTooSoon: OTP was sent recently. Please wait before requesting again.
otp.rateLimited: Too many OTP requests. Please try again later.

invite.alreadyPending: A pending invitation already exists for this email.
invite.alreadyMember: This email already belongs to a workspace member.

file.empty: File is required and cannot be empty.
file.tooLarge: File is too large. Maximum allowed size is {{maxBytes}} bytes.
file.invalidMimeType: File MIME type is not allowed.
file.forbidden: You are not allowed to perform this action on files.
file.rateLimited: Too many file requests. Please try again later.

mailbox.emailAlreadyUsed: Mailbox email address is already used in this workspace.
mailbox.lastActiveCannotDeactivate: Cannot deactivate the last active mailbox.
mailbox.defaultConflict: Unable to update default mailbox. Please retry.

contactIdentity.alreadyExists: This identity already exists in this workspace.

ticketCategory.slugAlreadyUsed: Ticket category slug is already used in this workspace.
ticketCategory.parentCannotBeSelf: Ticket category cannot be its own parent.
ticketCategory.parentCycle: Ticket category parent would create a cycle.

ticketTag.nameAlreadyUsed: Ticket tag name is already used in this workspace.

ticket.contactNotFound: Contact not found for this ticket.
ticket.organizationNotFound: Organization not found for this ticket.
ticket.organizationMismatch: Organization does not match the selected contact.
ticket.assigneeNotFound: Assignee is not available in this workspace.
ticket.assignOthersNotAllowed: You can only assign tickets to yourself from this endpoint.
ticket.selfAssignNotAvailable: This ticket is already assigned to another user and cannot be self-assigned.
ticket.unassignNotAllowed: You are not allowed to unassign this ticket.
ticket.invalidStatusTransition: Cannot change ticket status from {{from}} to {{to}}.
ticket.solveNotAllowed: This ticket cannot be marked as solved from {{from}}.
ticket.closeNotAllowed: This ticket cannot be closed from {{from}}. It must be {{requiredFrom}} first.
ticket.reopenNotAllowed: This ticket cannot be reopened from {{from}}. Only {{allowedFromOne}} or {{allowedFromTwo}} tickets can be reopened.
ticket.participantUserNotFound: Participant user is not available in this workspace.
ticket.mailboxChangeNotAllowed: Mailbox cannot be changed after messages already exist on the ticket. Current message count: {{messageCount}}.
ticket.attachmentsNotSupportedYet: Initial message attachments are not supported yet.
ticket.conversationInvariantFailed: Ticket conversation is missing or inconsistent.
ticket.closedMessageNotAllowed: Cannot add a {{type}} while the ticket is {{status}}. Only {{allowedType}} is allowed until the ticket is reopened.
ticket.attachmentAlreadyLinked: One or more files are already attached to another message.
